hypothesis: After the accepted 40% initial position cap and 50% day-2 add-on, the portfolio heat cap may be the remaining materiality ceiling. A modestly wider heat budget could let confirmed winners receive add-ons without changing entry quality.

rejection_reason: Changing the portfolio heat budget did not improve the accepted stack robustly enough.
next_retry_requires: Do not retry nearby global heat-cap values without new concentration evidence.
A valid retry needs an independent allocation signal or forward/paper evidence.
